storyline.title: The Awakening
storyline.prologue: You awaken in a strange realm with no memory of your past. The villagers speak of an ancient darkness spreading across the land. As you explore, you begin to realize you may be the only one who can stop it.

chapters.title: A Stranger in the Land
chapters.description: Learn about your surroundings and gain the trust of the locals.

chapters.title: The Shadow's Whisper
chapters.description: Investigate the mysterious darkness affecting the realm.

chapters.title: Gathering Allies
chapters.description: Unite the people against the coming threat.

chapters.title: The Final Stand
chapters.description: Confront the source of the darkness and save the realm.

main.title: First Steps
main.description: Speak to the villagers and learn about this strange realm.
main.hint: Approach villagers and press E to talk to them.

main.title: The Guard's Concern
main.description: A guard has noticed your arrival. Speak with them to learn more.

objectives.description: Find and speak to a guard

main.hint: Guards patrol the area. Look for someone in armor.

main.title: Merchant's Request
main.description: The merchant needs help. Perhaps aiding them will prove your good intentions.
main.hint: Help NPCs to increase your karma. Be kind in conversations.

main.title: Dark Whispers
main.description: The villagers speak of strange shadows at night. Investigate.

objectives.description: Find a wanderer who has seen the shadows

main.hint: Wanderers travel the forests and may have seen things others haven't.

main.title: The Healer's Wisdom
main.description: Seek out a healer who may know about the ancient darkness.
main.hint: Healers tend to the sick. They carry staffs with glowing orbs.

main.title: Forging Bonds
main.description: You must unite the people. Gain the trust of all types of inhabitants.
main.hint: The blacksmith's forge glows with heat. Build relationships with everyone.

main.title: The Realm's Champion
main.description: You have proven yourself worthy. Lead the realm against the darkness.
main.hint: Your actions define you. Help everyone you meet.

side.title: The Lost Traveler
side.description: A wanderer seems lost. Perhaps you can help them.

side.title: Trading Stories
side.description: The merchant has many tales. Listen and learn.

side.title: Village Patrol
side.description: The guards could use someone to help watch over the village.

side.title: Healing Hands
side.description: Learn about the healing arts from local healers.

side.title: The Forge's Flame
side.description: The blacksmith speaks of their craft with passion.

side.title: Social Butterfly
side.description: Get to know everyone in the realm.
